Testimonial.title: Testimonial
Testimonial.description: Represents a user-submitted testimonial for the EvenTide platform.

name.description: The name or business name of the person submitting the testimonial.

role.description: The role of the user on the platform.

isApproved.description: Moderation status, true if approved to be publicly visible.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the testimonial was submitted.

/testimonials/{testimonialId}.description: Stores user-submitted testimonials for moderation and display.
